name: error_logger
description: Manages the ErrorLog.md file within the sandboxed project directory. Logs errors with severity, context, attempted solutions, and resolution status. Supports adding errors, updating resolution status, and querying the error history.

action.description: Action to perform on the error log.

project_dir.description: Absolute path to the sandboxed project directory containing ErrorLog.md.

error_id.description: Error identifier (e.g., E-001). Required for resolve_error and add_attempt.

title.description: Short error title. Required for log_error.

source.description: Where the error originated (file path, agent ID, tool name).

details.description: Full error details, stack trace, or description.

attempted_fix.description: Description of an attempted fix (for add_attempt action).

resolution.description: How the error was resolved (for resolve_error action).
